description: Transient high methane alarm (15% LEL) triggered in Area B during night shift.
root_cause: Fugitive emission from crude oil transfer flange upstream; resolved by flange bolt tightening.
corrective_action: Tightened flange bolts, calibrated GAS-DET-11 to verify accuracy.

description: Methane sensor calibration failure during weekly safety test.
root_cause: Sensor poisoning from silicone compound vapors used in nearby painting work.
corrective_action: Replaced poisoned gas sensor element, calibrated and updated warning procedure.
